---
title: "RL Quay Crane"
description: "Research into automating quay cranes with reinforcement learning"
date: "2021-02-11"
image: ../img/rl_crane.png # Add a small preview image for the grid
categories: [Personal R&D Project, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Proof of Concept]
---

![](../img/rl_crane.png)

## Overview
This is a high-level overview. You can put key takeaways in the margin.

::: {.column-margin}
**Key Insight:** Model accuracy improved by 15% using this specific weight initialization.
:::

## Interactive Visualization

```{=html}
<div style="position:relative; width:100%; aspect-ratio:16/9;">
  <iframe style="position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;"
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/U9P5iYCrD-k?si=1VNXOxR6nzeM7TVu&amp;start=3"
    title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0"
    allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</div>

```
